id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7082534500386737183","book_info":{"abstract":"【迪化+阅读轻松+日常+搞笑+无敌】
林源无缘修炼，在青龙城开了家药馆，平时写写书、种种花，调侃下邻家小妹，悠然自得，以为这辈子会平淡过去，没想到……
他的一本书，令无数隐世老妖怪挤破头皮争抢。
他酿的一坛酒，让酒剑仙在每年桃花开时如约出现。
一首情歌一首曲，狐仙圣/女愿为他守候千年。
跨越时空而来的智能科幻手机美妞天天为他温/铺。
那些本该具备主角剧本的天资，在他面前却只能低头自卑。
他拍一场电影，人皇都只是配角，兽王只是坐骑。
他的一场百家讲坛，令千万修士顿悟突破，全天下同触雷劫。
在大家看来，他低调儒雅，又爱财如命，他多才多艺，又不拘小节，他金句频出，又开悟苍生，他……
是这世界的神！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ae56497f3448b6f1ef90d4252df86432~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乙木","author_id":"","book_id":"7082534500386737183","book_name":"求你们别拜了，我真不是仙圣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7082699665069572623","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"115877"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"32","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,搞笑轻松,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ae56497f3448b6f1ef90d4252df86432~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779502227&x-signature=0HoTxrF3Kd5qI11WmCVWPigJ4yM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4173401640668116","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.747876e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241010274DB1805D792E2151EB28"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"rep
